_comment: EDGE / Procedure A. JWS-signed agent card (Layer 0 Edit 4 — signed from v0.1.0). The agent advertises a JWS-signed agent card; the card signature validates as part of A1/A2 resolution. An unsigned card would be non-compliant (hardening against the A2A AITM precedent). Expected ACCEPT mode=PLAY.

agentCard._comment: JWS-signed agent card advertised in the DID Document service[]. Header.payload.signature shape (JWS compact serialization, truncated).
